mapper.insert: INSERT INTO learning_logs (action_type, word_id, answered_at, correct) VALUES (#{actionType}, #{wordId}, #{answeredAt}, #{correct})
mapper.select: SELECT CAST(answered_at AS DATE) AS learning_date, COUNT(*) AS action_count FROM learning_logs WHERE CAST(answered_at AS DATE) BETWEEN #{fromDate} AND #{toDate} GROUP BY CAST(answered_at AS DATE) ORDER BY learning_date ASC
